inputs.text: Mujhe bahut tezi se bukhar chadha hai, sir dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Non-specific symptoms of fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache can be initial symptoms, but more specific symptoms are needed

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Joint pain is more common in Chikungunya, but retro-orbital pain can occur

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Non-specific symptoms, but less likely to cause retro-orbital pain

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikhle hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Rash and bleeding gums are less common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with cyclical fever and chills

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, khada nahin ho pa raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Severe weakness and inability to stand are consistent with Dengue hemorrhagic fever

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to specific symptoms and severity

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of cyclical fever and chills
